steps.title: Set up the percentage relationship
steps.content: The April price is p% of the March price, so: $$(p/100) \times 15.50 = 17.36$$

steps.title: Verify the answer with backsolving
steps.content: Backsolving — testing choice C (112): $1.12 \times 15.50 = 17.36$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
